content: Strategizing = trigger-driven event, НЕ по расписанию. Если strategizing scheduled без trigger → это performance ritual, не strategizing

content: DRR artifact components (per E.9): Problem frame / Decision / Rationale / Consequences / Kill conditions / Review checkpoint
quote: Required artifact components (per E.9 DRR): Problem frame — what trigger fired? Decision — chosen method. Rationale — alternatives considered; Pillar check; taxonomy lens; DRR Δ-class. Consequences — benefits, trade-offs, impacts, risks. Kill conditions — explicit criteria for reverting decision. Review checkpoint — когда revisit.

content: Левенчук Анатолий — автор FPF (First Principles Framework), «Системное мышление 2024», «Методология 2025», «Интеллект-стек 2023», «Системная инженерия 2022», «Инженерия личности 2023». Blog ailev.livejournal.com. МИМ system-school.ru

content: ШСМ (Школа Системного Менеджмента) — community systemsworld.club; Левенчук school. Левенчук definition of trans-discipline: «дисциплины для рассуждения в ходе задействования прикладных дисциплин»
quote: «Дисциплины интеллект-стека называют часто трансдисциплинами, это 'дисциплины для рассуждения в ходе задействования прикладных дисциплин' (trans- — это 'находящиеся по ту сторону' от прикладных дисциплин).»

content: 17 vs 16 disciplines history: pre-2019 STEM → 2019 6 proto → Aug 2021 16 levels → End-2021 17 (Труд added) → 2023 16 (Труд→Системная инженерия, Математика+Физика added, Экономика/Объяснения/Теория-информации removed). For Jetix: use 16 always

content: Holonic Trinity Invariant (A.1): U.Entity → U.Holon → {U.System, U.Episteme}. All composition units are U.Holon (whole-and-part simultaneously). Jetix itself = U.Holon (dual U.System + U.Episteme aspect)
quote: U.Entity → U.Holon → {U.System, U.Episteme}. All composition units are U.Holon (whole-and-part simultaneously). Every change enacted by external transformer (A.12 Reflexive Split). U.System (operational) separate от U.Episteme (passive knowledge).

content: Transformer Quartet (A.3): U.System-in-Role (bearer playing role) / U.MethodDescription (recipe) / U.Method (abstract way) / U.Work (record of occurrence). Jetix: executor-binding.yaml / role.md Block 3 / Shape Up MECE F.6 / alphas+git
quote: Four canonical types ground method execution: U.System-in-Role (bearer playing role). U.MethodDescription (recipe). U.Method (abstract way of doing). U.Work (record of occurrence).

content: Role-Method-Work Alignment (A.15): Roles bind к Methods bind к Work records. Plan vs reality never conflated. Only U.Work carries actuals. Firewall: 'who does what/how/when' → A.15, NOT mereology A.14
quote: Roles bind к Methods bind к Work records. Plan vs reality never conflated. Only U.Work carries actuals... Firewall: "who does what/how/when" → A.15, NOT mereology A.14.

content: B.1 Γ Universal Algebra of Aggregation — 6 flavours: Γ_sys (system-specific) / Γ_epist (knowledge provenance) / Γ_ctx (contextual) / Γ_time (temporal) / Γ_method (order-sensitive composition) / Γ_work (work as spent resource)
quote: Γ_sys ... Γ_epist ... Γ_ctx ... Γ_time ... Γ_method ... Γ_work. Invariants preserved: WLNK (weakest-link), MONO (monotonicity), IDEM (idempotence), COMM (commutativity, except Γ_ctx/Γ_time), LOC (locality).

content: B.3 F-G-R Trust Calculus: F (Formality F0-F9 scale) / G (ClaimScope set-valued) / R (Reliability evidence-bound, weakest-link, pathwise). Bridge-only reuse + CL penalties. Expected Jetix range F0-F3 (rarely F4+). R-levels: low/medium/high/certified/formally-proven
quote: F (Formality) — F0-F9 scale. G (ClaimScope) — set-valued scope где claim applies. R (Reliability) — evidence-bound warrant, weakest-link composition, pathwise justification. Bridge-only reuse + CL penalties... Expected Jetix range: F0-F3 (rarely F4+).

content: D.5 Bias-Audit & Ethical Assurance — 4-stage cycle BA-0/BA-1/BA-2/BA-3. Phase 1 simplified: BA-0 + BA-1 + BA-3 (solo Ruslan, no BA-2 Panel). BA-2 activation: Phase 2a (Beirat Ethics advisor). 5-class Bias Taxonomy: REP/ALG/VIS/MET/LNG

content: B.2 Meta-Holon Transition (MHT): когда composition yields new coherent whole с own boundary/objective/capabilities → declare MHT. BOSC-A-T-X triggers. Event taxonomy: Fusion/Fission/Phase Promotion/Role-Lift/Context Reframe
quote: When composition yields new coherent whole с own boundary, objective, capabilities that cannot be faithfully treated as just parts folded together → declare MHT. BOSC-A-T-X triggers: Boundary / Objective / Structural / Capability / Agency / Temporal / Context-rebase. Event taxonomy: Fusion / Fission / Phase Promotion / Role-Lift / Context Reframe.

content: 4 documented MHTs: MHT-1 Phase 1→2a (solo+hire trigger Triple-AND) / MHT-2 Phase 2a→2b (team 5-20) / MHT-3 Phase 2b→2c (€10-50M multi-entity first acquisition) / MHT-4 Phase 2c→3 (€50M+ multi-entity federation)
quote: MHT-1: Phase 1 → 2a (solo + hire) — trigger: Triple-AND. MHT-2: Phase 2a → 2b (team 5-20). MHT-3: Phase 2b → 2c (€10-50M, multi-entity, first acquisition). MHT-4: Phase 2c → 3 (€50M+, multi-entity federation).

content: Pragmatic stance (GR-2 Notational Independence): Import exactly as much formalism as needed to solve specific problem informal language cannot solve. No more. (Per Левенчук middle path)

content: When to defer formalism: Full category theory (functors, natural transformations, monads) — defer к Phase 3 OR когда 50+ agents. Full constructor theory as physics — skip permanently (FPF explicitly excludes)

content: Jetix decision pipeline modeled as Transduction Graph: Problem frame (FormalSubstrate) → Decision (PrincipleFrame) → Method Selection (SelectionAndTuning) → Implementation (WorkPlanning + Work) → Review (EvaluatingAndRefreshing)

content: Kernel discipline: Row #1-31 в U-Types table = Kernel/Extension Stratum-1/2 (one Kernel entry per U-Type). Row #32-33 = Stratum-3 Context specialization via ⊑ (subtype-of) relation
